title: Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Human Trafficking Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Human Trafficking Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Domestic Violence Issues Homeless Families Homeless Veterans Homeless Youth Human Trafficking Issues Pregnant Individuals Sexual Assault Issues Veterans Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF COMMUNITY WORKS JACKSON COUNTY CONTINUUM OF CARE SCREENINGS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an access point for being placed on Jackson County's Centralized Interest List for housing. 2594 E Barnett Road Suite C Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Households experiencing homelessness or at risk of becoming homeless, with a focus on serving people experiencing domestic violence, sexual assault, stalking, or trafficking, as well as youth. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 779-4357 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY WORKS JACKSON COUNTY CONTINUUM OF CARE SCREENINGS
